text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has begun, but Copano Rickey is
exhausted from all her recent media appearances.
I decide to turn down all interviews for the
duration of the camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the increasing popularity of feng shui,
the number of Umamusume quitting the academy
remains unchanged.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Why doesn't feng shui seem to resonate with the
other students? To find the answer, Copano
Rickey sets out to put a smile on everyone's face
during summer camp.
